Attempt to update Cura to 5.7.0 (v5: fix Cura user settings path + restore cura deps)

Oops, I had removed from cad/cura dependencies net/py-zeroconf to test (it fails to build ATM), but it should stay.

Btw today is the day of devel/sip4 removal...
